title: FancySporeBlossom Forked
description: A Mod which adds a Fancy Spore Blossom to the game
body:
## What is this mod?

This is a Minecraft mod which adds a new fancy spore blossom block into the game.

The fancy spore blossom can be dyed any color (the same as how leather armour dying works in the Vanilla game), and the particle effects and block will match the dyed color.

In addition, there is Leaf Spore Blossom, that uses falling leaf textures instead of spores.
And if there is redstone signal - Spore Blossom will not emit particles.

Leaf textures from [Particular ✨ Reforged](https://modrinth.com/mod/particular-reforged)


Original mod [HERE](https://modrinth.com/mod/fancysporeblossom)
